Appearances:
Plaintiff Levy & Co. is present. Represented by
Attorney Aaron Farmer appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Andrew J. Keefer is present.
Attorney Aaron Morrison representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Elizabeth Riles, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of April 22, 2013 remains on calendar. (501/JPT)
